result.status_detail: Microsoft account requires profile completion (birthday + country) before Copilot chat is usable. Submitting prompt redirected to account-setup form, never reached chat backend or APF.

notes: PC2 cross-env verify (Multi-PC v2.0 first dual dispatch ??copilot WSS investigation per prev #893 FAIL). Cannot diagnose WSS envelope/protocol mismatch from this PC2 session: account-details onboarding form (?앹씪/援??) intercepts before the prompt reaches Copilot's chat backend. No /chat/* or /sydney/* network request emitted post-Enter. APF intercept never had a chance to fire on PC2. Required to unblock: complete MS account profile in this Chrome instance, then re-dispatch 896. Browser automation via Claude_in_Chrome substitute.
